message:
tests: e2e tmux interactive smoke test infrastructure

Add TmuxInstance helper for driving interactive Pi sessions in tests:

TmuxInstance struct:
- socket_name/session_name: unique identifiers based on PID + test seed
- tmux_available(): checks if tmux binary exists
- new(): creates instance with deterministic naming
- tmux_base(): builds base command with socket and null config
- run_checked(): executes tmux command with error handling

Session management:
- start_session(): creates detached 80x24 session with script
- session_exists(): checks if session is still alive
- kill_server(): cleanup method for Drop impl

Pane interaction:
- target_pane(): returns session:window.pane format
- send_literal(): sends text literally (-l flag)
- send_key(): sends key name (Enter, Escape, etc.)
- capture_pane(): captures pane content with scrollback

Wait helpers:
- wait_for_pane_contains(): polls until needle found or timeout
- wait_for_pane_contains_any(): polls for any of multiple needles

Shell helpers:
- sh_escape(): POSIX shell single-quote escaping for command args

Test: e2e_interactive_smoke_tmux (Unix only):
- Spawns Pi in tmux session
- Verifies interactive UI renders
- Tests keyboard input and response handling
- Validates /help command output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
